project_type: Monorepo with 13 Next.js/React apps, shared packages, Fastify backends per app
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. Commands: turbo build/test/typecheck/lint
test_framework: vitest with globals:true. Tests in apps/*/src/__tests__/ and packages/*/__tests__/
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm install 2) pnpm typecheck 3) pnpm test 4) pnpm build 5) pnpm lint
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs, all gates pass (typecheck, test, build, lint), axe-core zero violations

key_patterns.api_client_pattern: Each app has apps/<app>/src/services/api-client.ts with a class wrapping fetch() and typed methods. Each already has full CRUD methods matching backend routes.
key_patterns.shared_query_hooks: @quant/api-client package provides createQueryHook, createMutationHook, createInfiniteQueryHook, useSubscription factories using @tanstack/react-query v5
key_patterns.state_components: @quant/shared-ui exports EmptyState, LoadingState, ErrorState, Skeleton components already available
key_patterns.page_structure: quantai/quantchat/quantmail use Next.js App Router (src/app/page.tsx). quantedits/quantmax/quantneon/quantube use pages dir (src/pages/index.tsx).
key_patterns.mock_pattern: Pages define inline arrays or generator functions (generateMockVideos, generateMockPosts) and render them directly. FIXME(phase-23) comment marks each.
key_patterns.hooks_pattern: Each app has hooks (useAIChat, useFeed, etc.) that also contain mock generators internally - these need to be rewired to api-client calls.

directory_structure: apps/ - 13 frontend apps with own backends | packages/ - ~40 shared libraries | services/ - infrastructure workers | Each app: src/app/ or src/pages/ for pages, src/services/ for API clients, src/hooks/ for custom hooks
